description_en: Zurich may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 147 halal restaurants and 11 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Zurich, Switzerland, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Zurich: 147+ halal restaurants, 11 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.4/5.
